name: Codebase Processing Pipeline
task: Execute the code standards, inline commenting, and architecture documentation prompts sequentially to ensure code quality and comprehensive documentation.

input_parameters.paths: A list of directory or file paths to process.

pipeline_stages.purpose: Cleans up the code format, ensures naming conventions, and enforces basic C# best practices.
Scans the standardized source code and inserts XML documentation (<summary>, <remarks>) describing what classes, fields, and methods do, and why they are used.
Reads the finalized C# files to generate and update a tree of *Read.md architecture files, populating class summaries and generating Mermaid.js diagrams.

instructions: Run the pipeline strictly in the order of the defined stages.
Stage 1: Execute the Code Standards prompt to refactor the codebase to a clean baseline.
Stage 2: Execute the In-Code XML Comments prompt to document the clean code.
Stage 3: Execute the Architecture Markdown prompt so the external documentation correctly reflects the final code structure.
Do NOT combine these responsibilities. Each prompt should only perform its designated action.
